! 床暖房デバッグテスト

TITLE
	L3-01 Radiant Floor Heating Test ;

GDAT
	FILE w=tokyo_3column_SI.has ;
	RUN 1/1-1/2 ;
	PRINT 1/1-1/2 *wd ;
*

EXSRF
	r=0.2 ;
	south a=0.0 ;
	north a=180.0 ;
	east  a=90.0 ;
	west  a=270.0 ;
	Hor ;
	earth Z=1.5 ;
*

WALL
	-E:ExtWall  RC-150 FPS-50 GPB-12 ;
	-E:Fnd  RC-120 ;
	-R:Roof     FPS-100 GPB-12 ;
	-f:FloorPanel  WDB-12 <P> WDB-9 FPS-100 ;
	-c:CeilingPanel  WDB-12 <P> WDB-9 FPS-100 ;
	-F:Floor    GPB-12 FPS-100 RC-150 ;
*

ROOM
	LivingRoom  Vol=100.0
		*s
		alc=4.6
		south: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
		north: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
		east:  -E ExtWall 12.5 ;
		west:  -E ExtWall 12.5 ;
		Hor:   -R Roof 40.0 ;
		(Foundation): -f FloorPanel alc=6.6 40.0 i=FloorPanel ;
	*

	Foundation  Vol=40.0
		alc=4.6
		(LivingRoom): -c CeilingPanel alc=6.6 i=FloorPanel ;
		south: -E Fnd 8.0 ;
		north: -E Fnd 8.0 ;
		east:  -E Fnd 5.0 ;
		west:  -E Fnd 5.0 ;
		earth: -F Floor alc=2.2 40.0 ;
	*
*

EQPCAT
	BOI floorboiler Qo=3200 ;
*

SYSCMP
	Boiler -c floorboiler ;
*

SYSPTH
	FloorHeatingPath -sys A -f W
		> (0.128) Boiler FloorPanel > ;
*

CONTL
	if (LivingRoom_FloorPanel_Ts < 25)
		FloorHeatingPath=1 ;
	LOAD -e Boiler Boiler_Tout=45 ;
*
*
